data.title: Write RED structural boundary test for consideration AC injection in brainstorm SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description
Write a failing structural boundary test (tests/skills/test-brainstorm-consideration-ac.sh) that asserts the following elements exist in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md:
1. 'injected' listed as a 5th provenance category in the Provenance Tracking section
2. Instructions for constructing ACs from CONSIDERATION signals with 3 required fields: (a) shared resource name, (b) overlapping epic ID+title, (c) falsifiable integration constraint
3. Deduplication rule: deduplicate by shared resource name
4. 'injected' rendering rule at approval gate (bold, same as inferred/researched)
5. Reference to '## Cross-Epic Interactions' section placement
6. Provenance summary formula updated to account for 'injected' count

Also add mapping to .test-index: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md -> tests/skills/test-brainstorm-consideration-ac.sh

Testing mode: RED (test must fail before Task 2 is implemented)

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-brainstorm-consideration-ac.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE: add new test mapping)
